signal.title: Opus 4.6, Codex 5.3, and the post-benchmark era
signal.reason: This headline directly addresses a critical and evolving topic for the target audience: the limitations of traditional AI benchmarks and the shift towards new evaluation methodologies. Mentioning specific top-tier models (Opus, Codex) grounds it in current industry context, while 'post-benchmark era' signals a strategic discussion highly relevant to investment, technological assessment, and startup differentiation.
